backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (Project, Task, Document, Media, Contact, CostItem, etc.), state variables using Maps and Sets, and including mixins for storage, access control, and invite links functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including project dropdown in topbar, welcome screen navigation after login/logout, project session management with localStorage, and automatic last-used project loading.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend files describing App.tsx routing logic, useQueries hooks with backward compatibility, page components with updated terminology (Phase/Projekt), and UI components with drag-and-drop and PDF preview capabilities.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, title "Umbau Manager", root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component with global PDF.js worker initialization, QueryClient setup, routing logic for all pages (Dashboard, Roadmap, Tasks, etc.), authentication flow with Internet Identity, profile setup modal, welcome screen navigation after login/logout, and automatic last-used project loading from localStorage.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Responsive layout component with collapsible sidebar (desktop) and mobile menu, header containing ProjectDropdown between title and user menu, navigation for all main pages, theme toggle, logout functionality, and footer with dynamic year and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/BaseDialog.tsx: Reusable dialog wrapper component with consistent styling, configurable max-width, scroll handling for long content, and prevention of accidental closes via onPointerDownOutside.
frontend/src/components/CalendarView.tsx: Displays a monthly calendar grid showing projects and tasks by date, with navigation controls and support for undated projects. Filters projects by date range and tasks by due date, excluding completed tasks.
frontend/src/components/CalendarWidget.t: Shows a compact list of the next 5 upcoming events (project start dates and task due dates) sorted chronologically. Displays event type, name, date/time, and project color indicators.
frontend/src/components/CostItemsSection: Manages cost items for a project with add/remove functionality, categorization (Energie, Material, etc.), status tracking (geplant, bezahlt, offen), and displays total cost. Each item includes description, amount, category, and status.
frontend/src/components/DeleteConfirmDia: Reusable confirmation dialog for delete operations with customizable title, description, and item name display. Includes pending state handling and destructive action styling.
frontend/src/components/DynamicSelect.ts: Select dropdown component with inline option creation via dialog. Allows users to add new options dynamically while selecting, with validation for duplicates and empty values.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component that catches rendering errors and displays a fallback UI with error message and reload button. Logs errors to console for debugging.
frontend/src/components/JoinFamilyDialog: Dialog for joining a family/project using an invite code. Validates input, handles join mutation with error states, and provides success callback for navigation.
frontend/src/components/PDFThumbnail.tsx: Renders a thumbnail preview of a PDF's first page using PDF.js, with localStorage caching (by URL hash) to avoid re-rendering and quota management to keep the last 20 thumbnails.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for initial user profile setup, collecting name, email (optional), and user type (privat/business) with form validation and submission via useSaveCallerUserProfile hook.
Dropdown select component for choosing a project from all available projects, displaying project color dots, and providing a "Create New" option that triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/ProjectTimelineI: Tabbed input component for project timeline with two modes: exact date range (start/end dates) or month range (start/end months), using controlled inputs.
frontend/src/components/team/InviteMembe: Dialog component for generating team invitation links with role selection (admin/user/guest) and clipboard copy functionality.
frontend/src/components/team/TeamTab.tsx: Team management UI displaying team members list with role badges, allowing admins to invite members, update roles, and remove members.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPDFViewer: Full-featured PDF viewer dialog with page navigation, zoom controls, fullscreen mode, download option, and aggressive caching (ArrayBuffer for PDFs, DataURL for rendered pages) to optimize performance.
frontend/src/components/UpcomingTasksWid: Dashboard widget displaying up to 7 upcoming open tasks sorted by due date, showing task title, category, due date/time, urgency color indicator, and associated project name with click handlers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and identity persistence with AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useProjectSession.ts: Hook for persisting and retrieving the last used project ID in localStorage for session continuity.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, team management, projects, tasks, documents, media, costs, contacts, and links.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark theme colors, including sidebar, charts, and UI component styling.
frontend/src/lib/customCategories.ts: Manages custom category lists (Gewerke, Bereiche, Kategorien, Media, Documents) with localStorage persistence, providing default values and functions to get/add categories.
frontend/src/lib/dateUtils.ts: Provides date utility functions for German locale formatting, week calculations (Monday-Sunday), bigint timestamp conversions, and month range handling.
frontend/src/lib/focusManager.ts: Exports React hooks (useFocusOnMount, useFocusWithRestore) for managing focus on modal dialog inputs with optional delays and focus restoration.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ApplyInvite.tsx: Handles invite token processing from URL parameters, authenticates user, joins family/project via backend mutation, and displays status feedback.
frontend/src/pages/Contacts.tsx: Manages contacts (Kontakt) and helpful links (HilfreicherLink) with CRUD operations, filtering, search, and includes a TeamTab component for team management.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard displaying projects, tasks, contacts, cost overview, calendar view, and upcoming tasks with dialogs for creating projects/tasks and timeline management.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Document management page with folder-based organization, PDF upload/preview, status tracking, and dynamic category (Bereich) management. Supports batch file uploads with progress tracking and integrates UnifiedPDFViewer for document viewing.
frontend/src/pages/Kostenuebersicht.tsx: Cost overview page displaying cost items across projects with inline editing, filtering by status, sorting, and document linking. Includes PDF viewer integration and supports adding/editing/deleting cost items with category and status management.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a marketing layout with feature highlights (project management, workflows, secure storage) and a login card.
frontend/src/pages/Media.tsx: Media gallery page with grid/list views, drag-and-drop reordering, image/PDF upload and preview, search/filter by category, and inline editing. Supports bulk position updates and dynamic category management.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectSelection.tsx: Project selection interface displaying all projects in a grid layout with metadata (dates, category, color). Stores selected project ID in sessionStorage and navigates to dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/Roadmap.tsx: Project roadmap page with list/calendar views, project CRUD operations, timeline management (exact dates or month ranges), cost items integration, and expandable project details. Includes dynamic category management and contact assignment.
frontend/src/pages/Tasks.tsx: Task management page with kanban-style columns (Aufgaben, Diese Woche, Benötigt Feedback, Erledigt), filtering by Gewerke/Bereich/Project, and CRUD operations for tasks with support for URL-based task selection from Dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/WelcomeScreen.tsx: Entry screen after authentication displaying three action cards: create new project, return to existing project, or join existing project via invitation code, with logout functionality.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme for sidebar/chart colors, custom animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document describing the Umbau Manager app architecture, including project dropdown in topbar, localStorage-based project persistence, welcome screen navigation flow, and known issues with project switching after login.
